citation.description: McpConfig dataclass fields auth_proxy_secret_env/secret_header/identity_header/scopes; _SECTIONS['mcp'] coercers at lines 627-630; MCP_ENV_VARS entries in mcp_server.py at lines 341-381; server.json entries at lines 177-195.

criteria.criterion: The `auth_proxy_*` config fields exist in `McpConfig`/`_SECTIONS['mcp']` (`_config_schema.py`); their derived `REBAR_MCP_AUTH_PROXY_*` env-var names are in `MCP_ENV_VARS` (`mcp_server.py`) + `server.json`; and `scripts/check_server_manifest.py` passes.

Unit test asserts: with a valid `auth_proxy_secret` header, the identity header yields an `AccessToken` whose `client_id`=identity, `scopes`=`auth_proxy_scopes`, and `resource==auth_resource_server_url`; without the secret, the identity header is stripped and the request is unauthenticated (401).

citation.description: test_spoofed_identity_stripped_without_secret parametrized over four header name variants; test_entire_x_forwarded_family_stripped_without_secret checks the whole x-forwarded-* family.

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts a client cannot spoof identity: sending `x-forwarded-user` (or underscore/case variants) directly WITHOUT the valid secret is stripped and never trusted; and that the entire `X-Forwarded-*` family is stripped in that case.

citation.description: test_refuses_start_when_secret_env_absent and test_refuses_start_when_secret_env_empty both raise AuthConfigError.

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts the verifier refuses to start when the env var named by `auth_proxy_secret_env` is absent or empty (observable oracle: startup raises a clear message).

citation.description: test_empty_proxy_scopes_403_and_granted_scope_200 asserts 403 when auth_required_scopes set but no proxy scopes, and 200 when auth_proxy_scopes matches.

criteria.criterion: Unit test asserts `auth_proxy_scopes` defaults to an empty set when unset, so a valid proxy principal holds no scopes and is denied 403 by a non-empty `auth_required_scopes` (observable oracle: 403 with empty proxy scopes vs 200 once the required scope is granted).

citation.description: test_authenticated_proxy_request_200_and_bare_401 drives the full ASGI server (TestClient wraps ASGI via httpx transport); authed → 200 (composite audience check implicit in 200 response), bare → 401. The _drive() helper also uses httpx.ASGITransport at lines 133-139 for middleware tests.

criteria.criterion: Integration test (httpx `ASGITransport`) asserts an authenticated proxy request (valid secret + identity header) → 200, and that the proxy-minted token still passes the composite audience check; a bare request → 401.

citation.description: test_composition_static_token_without_proxy_identity uses auth_strategies=(proxy, static) and asserts 200 for a Bearer static token with no proxy headers.

criteria.criterion: Integration test asserts composition: with `auth_strategies=proxy,static`, a request with no proxy identity but a valid static token still succeeds (proxy verifier returns None, static accepts) — observable oracle: 200.

citation.description: Ticket comment attests: 'verified locally (ruff+format+zizmor+actionlint clean, mypy 327 files clean, full suite green) and by CI — Gerrit change 723 carries Verified+1 (build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions across py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macOS).' Concrete specifics: Gerrit change 723, Verified+1, named platforms.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
